title: Sony increasing PlayStation 5 prices across all consoles, starting April 2 PS5 and PS5 Digital Edition receive $100 hikes, while PS5 Pro will now sell for $900
summary: PlayStation 5 consoles are once again receiving price hikes due to the global economic crisis. The disc and digital editions of the base console are $100 more expensive now, while the PS5 Pro is up $150, now costing $900. You still have a few days to secure these consoles before the new pricing comes into effect from April 2.

title: US Supreme Court says ISPs aren t liable for their users piracy top judiciary body unanimously rules that Cox Communications did not commit copyright infringement
